hooks.name: pre-commit-quality-check
hooks.prompt: Before proceeding with this operation, perform a quick sanity check: Does the code compile? Are there any obvious syntax errors? Is the test suite configuration valid? Report blockers that would prevent execution.

hooks.name: post-analysis-logging
hooks.prompt: Log this analysis for the project record: Capture the tool name, timestamp, key findings, and any critical issues discovered. If there are critical issues (severity >= HIGH), also note recommended next steps.

hooks.name: safety-gate-deployment
hooks.prompt: This is a critical deployment check. Before proceeding, verify: 1) Have all model accuracy validations passed? 2) Is the kill-switch system functional and tested? 3) Are capital limits configured correctly? 4) Does the rollback plan exist and is it documented? If any answer is 'no', block deployment until rectified.
